content: The best databases in 2025 depend on your use case. For relational databases, PostgreSQL and MySQL remain top choices. For NoSQL, MongoDB and Redis are widely adopted.
Cloud-native options like Amazon Aurora, Google Cloud Spanner, and CockroachDB are gaining traction for distributed workloads.
